name: Avraham Fried
abstract: Avraham Shabsi Hakohen Friedman (Hebrew: אברהם שבתי הכהן פרידמן; born March 22, 1959) better known by his stage name, Avraham Fried, is an Orthodox Jewish American singer.

concerts.label: Concert for Freedom: Supporting Our Troops
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: There’s Hasidic pop recordings too, in Brooklyn. Mordechai Ben David, Avraham Fried, all those guys, Yeedle, all of them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023
